name: bdfl
description: Benevolent Delegator for LLMs with isolated Git worktrees

interface.shortDescription: Managed agents with safe Git integration
interface.longDescription: Benevolent Delegator for LLMs coordinates explicitly requested agents in isolated worktrees, routes native decisions, and validates work before integration.
interface.defaultPrompt: Install BDFL with the release installer, then explicitly ask BDFL to manage or delegate work.
